diagrams.title: Requirement Extraction Methods Classification
diagrams.description: Shows classification of requirement extraction methods into qualitative, quantitative, and observational categories
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different types of research methods and when to use each

diagrams.title: User-Centered Design Process
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing where requirement extraction fits in the overall UCD process
diagrams.purpose: Contextualizing requirement extraction within the broader design process

diagrams.title: User Journey Map Template
diagrams.description: Template showing components of a user journey map
elements: User Stages (Awareness, Consideration, Purchase, Use, Loyalty)
diagrams.purpose: Guiding the creation of journey maps for requirement analysis

diagrams.title: Card Sorting Process Flow
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the card sorting methodology
elements: Step 1: List content items on cards
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to conduct and use card sorting results
